subsetPolicy: deterministic first 600 records sorted by NORAD catalog id
renderPolicy: one current SGP4-propagated point primitive per copied TLE; no labels, paths, polylines, or orbit-history accumulation in leo-scale-points mode
refreshPolicy: ad-hoc explicit refresh only; rerun this script after fetching a new Celestrak export and rerun Phase 7.1 validation
licenseNote: Celestrak public GP/TLE data copied for bounded repo validation. This fixture is not ITRI authority data, live network truth, active satellite path truth, or measured performance truth.
